6.reason: The format string lacks a space before %c; it should be " %c" to skip any whitespace (spaces) between the number and operator. Without the space, a space character would be read into s2, causing logic errors.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  The format string lacks a space before %c; it should be " %c" to skip any whitespace (spaces) between the number and operator. Without the space, a space character would be read into s2, causing logic errors.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Missing space before %c: should be "%d %c" to skip whitespace between number and operator.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  格式字符串"%d%c"中缺少空格，%c会读取数字后的空白字符而非实际运算符，导致解析逻辑错误。应改为"%d %c"
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  scanf格式字符串中缺少空格，会导致将输入中的空格误读为运算符，应改为"%d %c"
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Missing space in format string causes incorrect parsing of input with spaces; should be "%d %c" to skip whitespace]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Missing space in format string causes incorrect parsing of input with spaces; should be "%d %c" to skip whitespace]
